meaning: adj.优美的,高雅的,精致的,剧烈的,异常的,细腻的,敏锐的
examples: The room was decorated in exquisite taste.
It was a scene of exquisite beauty.
Its walls enclose a still-intact 12th-century round tower, 13th-century Gothic cathedral and exquisite 12th-century Romanesque chapel.
An evening of geisha entertainment often begins with an exquisite meal of kaiseki (Japanese haute-cuisine).
